text: If passengers are on board when an abandon ship drill is carried out, they should:

options.text: Remain inside their cabins behind closed safety doors
Gather exclusively at public dining lounges
Be evacuated on an auxiliary service tender craft

explanation: During abandon ship drills, all persons on board, including passengers, are expected to participate. This ensures they are familiar with procedures, muster stations, and the use of safety equipment, aligning with SOLAS requirements.
